rationale: Section 11.01 establishes general taxability of real property but explicitly allows exemptions by law. Increasing the homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) is fully consistent with this framework.
quote: All real and tangible personal property that this state has jurisdiction to tax is taxable unless exempt by law.
_note: No conflict. §11.01(a) expressly permits exemptions by law; the proposed increase to the §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount operates within that allowance.
